goal: Add a working rule that related blocks should be bundled into one coherent autonomous goal-run when safe.
claims: AGENTS.md now instructs Codex to bundle related blocks into coherent autonomous goal-runs when safe.
The rule preserves WLP, contracts, scope gates, hard stops, and review packets.
assumptions: This is a workflow governance rule, not a product behavior change.
No runtime, tool, package, docs, or example change is needed.
dod: AGENTS.md contains the cohesive block run rule.
stop_conditions: Rule would weaken WLP or hard-stop behavior
Runtime or tool changes become necessary
prior_task_findings: User requested that related blocks be bundled and handled together instead of one tiny block at a time.
